reasoning: The control 7.2.3 focuses on ensuring that resources are not publicly accessible, which maps to Kubernetes environments by restricting network access and ensuring secure service configurations. NetworkPolicies can enforce default deny rules for ingress and egress traffic, which is analogous to preventing public access. Additionally, restricting the use of LoadBalancer service types and ensuring TLS is enabled for Ingress resources further aligns with the control's intent to limit public exposure.
title: Requirement 7.2.3
